name: BestStrat
description: An LLM-authored CMC Strategy Skill that turns market data into backtestable crypto strategy specs with regime detection, explicit rules, risk constraints, rationale, and backtest results.

dataPolicy.preferredSource: CoinMarketCap latest quote when CMC_API_KEY is configured
dataPolicy.fallback: Deterministic sample market data for local demo and development
dataPolicy.backtestCandles: Deterministic modeled candles generated from selected timeframe, lookback, and market inputs

constraints: No buy or sell order placement
Strategy specification and research output only
agentUseCase: Use this Skill when an AI agent or user needs a research-grade crypto strategy specification from CMC market context. Do not use it to execute live trades.
llmWorkflow: Normalize symbol, timeframe, lookbackDays, riskLevel, and strategyFocus from the user request.
Fetch or receive CoinMarketCap market context for the selected asset.
Score trend, momentum, volume, sentiment, volatility, and liquidity.
Classify the current regime before selecting a strategy mode.
Generate explicit entry, exit, risk, invalidation, no-trade, and position-sizing rules.
Backtest the rules over the selected lookback window and compare against buy-and-hold.
Return machine-readable JSON plus a human-readable report with disclaimers.
guardrails: No wallet connection or private key handling
Always disclose data source and fallback status
